mapper.select: SELECT id, boss_level AS bossLevel, boss_name AS bossName, max_hp AS maxHp, current_hp AS currentHp, status, feed_count AS feedCount, feed_target AS feedTarget, cycle_id AS cycleId, alliance_id AS allianceId, last_reset_date AS lastResetDate, server_id AS serverId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM alliance_boss WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND alliance_id = #{allianceId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, boss_level AS bossLevel, boss_name AS bossName, max_hp AS maxHp, current_hp AS currentHp, status, feed_count AS feedCount, feed_target AS feedTarget, cycle_id AS cycleId, alliance_id AS allianceId, last_reset_date AS lastResetDate, server_id AS serverId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM alliance_boss WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND alliance_id = #{allianceId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, boss_level AS bossLevel, boss_name AS bossName, max_hp AS maxHp, current_hp AS currentHp, status, feed_count AS feedCount, feed_target AS feedTarget, cycle_id AS cycleId, alliance_id AS allianceId, last_reset_date AS lastResetDate, server_id AS serverId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM alliance_boss WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND (alliance_id IS NULL OR alliance_id = '' OR alliance_id = '__LEGACY__') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alliance_boss (boss_level, boss_name, max_hp, current_hp, status, feed_count, feed_target, cycle_id, last_reset_date, server_id, alliance_id) VALUES (#{bossLevel}, #{bossName}, #{maxHp}, #{maxHp}, 'idle', 0, 100, 1, CURDATE(), #{serverId}, #{allianceId})
mapper.update: UPDATE alliance_boss SET current_hp = #{currentHp} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE alliance_boss SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE alliance_boss SET boss_level = #{bossLevel}, boss_name = #{bossName}, max_hp = #{maxHp}, current_hp = #{currentHp}, status = 'idle', feed_count = 0, cycle_id = cycle_id + 1, last_reset_date = CURDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE alliance_boss SET feed_count = feed_count + #{amount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alliance_boss_record (user_id, action_type, damage, feed_amount, server_id, alliance_id, cycle_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actionType}, #{damage}, #{feedAmount}, #{serverId}, #{allianceId}, #{cycleId})
